title: Eventbrite Events Scraper Pro Input
description: Search Eventbrite for events using keyword, location, date range, category, and price filters.

query.title: Search keyword
query.description: Keywords to search for on Eventbrite (e.g. 'AI conference', 'startup networking')

city.title: City
city.description: City to search in (e.g. 'San Francisco', 'New York', 'London')

dateFrom.title: Start date
dateFrom.description: Filter events starting from this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

dateTo.title: End date
dateTo.description: Filter events up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

maxPages.title: Max pages
maxPages.description: Number of search result pages to scrape (each page has ~20 events). Default: 5.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum total events to return. Default: 100.
